subtitle_one: Ready to continue your learning journey? You have <bold>1 course</bold> in progress.
subtitle_other: Ready to continue your learning journey? You have <bold>{{count}} courses</bold> in progress.

stats.insightsDescription: Analyze your circadian rhythm, focus intensity, and performance patterns.

noCoursesDescription: Lectures uploaded by your professors will appear here.
streakBanner: You're on a {{count}}-day streak! Keep the momentum going!

onboard.title: Welcome to Ascend
onboard.subtitle: Here's how you'll learn. Press Begin above to open your first lecture.

learn.title: Watch & read
learn.body: Move through interactive slides at your own pace.

quiz.title: Check yourself
quiz.body: Quick quizzes after each lecture lock in what you learned.

grow.title: Build momentum
grow.body: Earn XP, unlock trophies, and keep your daily streak alive.

review.title: You've completed every lecture
review.subtitle: Nice work, {{name}}. Revisit your weakest topics below to sharpen your edge.
